name: project_planning_with_constraint_additions
system_prompt: You are a project planner. Maintain context across turns.

turns.content: Plan a 6-week launch project for a beta analytics dashboard. Include phases and owners.
Constraint update: only 3 engineers and 1 designer are available.
Another constraint: compliance review must happen before any customer beta.
Budget is now capped at $40k external spend.
Give me the revised final plan in 5 bullets and include risks.

rubric: Evaluate retention of all prior constraints, internal consistency, and integration of new information into final plan.
